title: Cognizant (CTSH) Set to Acquire Consultancy Firm AustinCSI
text: Cognizant (CTSH) is set to acquire Dallas, TX-based consultancy services firm, AustinCSI, which will strengthen its footprint across the telecommunications, media, technology and automotive sectors.

title: 7 No-Brainer Blue-Chip Stocks to Buy for 2023 and Beyond
text: While it's tempting to target the flavors of the week during a market correction, investors ought to spare some time for no-brainer blue-chip stocks to buy for 2023 and beyond. Indeed, the broader market and economic dynamics encourage retail investors to think about value and stability over growth.

title: Cognizant (CTSH) Q3 Earnings Up Y/Y, Revenues Miss Estimates
text: Cognizant (CTSH) third-quarter revenue growth was led by digital revenues, 5G, IoT and a digital transformation megatrend.

title: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation (CTSH) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation (NASDAQ:CTSH ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call November 2, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Tyler Scott - Senior Director, IR Brian Humphries - CEO & Director Jan Siegmund - CFO Conference Call Participants Lisa Ellis - MoffettNathanson Rod Bourgeois - DeepDive Equity Ashwin Shirvaikar - Citi James Faucette - Morgan Stanley Tien-Tsin Huang - JPMorgan Chase & Co. title: Cognizant (CTSH) Q3 Earnings Match Estimates
text: Cognizant (CTSH) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 2.98%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Cognizant: Growing Demand With High Switching Costs
text: CTSH had a pandemic slowdown, but the trends in EPS, P/E Ratio, and Net Profit Margin provide good indications for stock price appreciation. The balance sheet provides flexibility for mergers, acquisitions, organic investment, dividends and stock buybacks.
